items.name_en: Genuine Grade
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE New Small HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag Must-Have Series! The rounded and smooth curved body looks even like a larger version of the familiar AVA at a glance ~ Celine never misses when they strike 🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. The bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 117253
Color: Material/Beige Brown
Size: 23x17x21

Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE New Kelly Bag

Style No.: 10M742
Color: Beige/Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 13.5x17.5x11cm

items.name_en: Genuine Grade
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TRIOMPHE Kelly Handbag👜
New Triomphe Clutch, Full of High-end Feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram color scheme, etc... all exude incomparable high-end feel❤️ Kelly's classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, all showing aesthetic charm🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113 Grey Color
Dimensions: 20.5x13x8 (Comes with original packaging)
